checks.name: Drawing number present
checks.description: Verify that the drawing number field in the title block is filled and legible
checks.passCriteria: Drawing number field is non-empty and legible

checks.name: Part name present
checks.description: Verify that the part name field in the title block is filled
checks.passCriteria: Part name field is non-empty and legible

checks.name: Revision present
checks.description: Verify that the revision or version number is present in the title block

checks.name: Color specification present
checks.description: Verify that the color or finish is specified

checks.name: Recycled material prohibition noted
checks.nameJa: 再生材使用不可の記載
checks.description: Check for notation about recycled material usage
checks.passCriteria: Recycled material prohibition or allowance is noted

checks.name: Environmental regulation compliance noted
checks.nameJa: 環境管理物質管理規定の記載
checks.description: Check for environmental substance management regulation reference

promptVariables.notationJa: 環境管理物質管理規定

checks.name: Note numbering continuity
checks.description: Verify that note numbers are sequential with no gaps or duplicates
checks.passCriteria: Note numbers are sequential without gaps

checks.name: Revision symbol consistency
checks.nameJa: 改訂記号と版数の一致
checks.description: Verify that the latest revision symbol matches the title block version
checks.passCriteria: Latest revision symbol matches title block version

checks.name: Gate method/position/count specified
checks.nameJa: ゲート方式・位置・取り数の記載
checks.description: For molded parts: verify gate specification

promptVariables.notationJa: ゲート方式・位置・取り数

checks.passCriteria: Gate method, position, and cavity count are specified

checks.name: Dimension overlap with outlines
checks.nameJa: 寸法線と外形線の重なり
checks.description: Check if dimension text or lines overlap with part outlines
checks.passCriteria: No dimension text or leader lines overlap with part outlines

checks.name: Outermost dimensions present
checks.description: Verify that overall dimensions are present for each view
checks.passCriteria: Overall width and height dimensions are present

checks.name: Duplicate/redundant dimensions
checks.description: Check for duplicate or redundant dimensions
checks.passCriteria: No duplicate or redundant dimensions found

checks.name: Filename matches title block
checks.nameJa: ファイル名と表題欄の一致
checks.description: Verify filename matches drawing number in title block
checks.passCriteria: Filename matches title block drawing number

checks.name: Tolerance notation consistency
checks.nameJa: 普通許容差の記載と斜線の一致
checks.description: Check general tolerance specification and slash marks
checks.passCriteria: General tolerance is specified and notation is consistent

checks.name: Missing dimensions on functional features
checks.description: Identify functional features and verify all have dimensions
checks.passCriteria: All identified functional features have associated dimensions

checks.name: Gate position vs stress-critical areas
checks.nameJa: ゲート位置と強度懸念部
checks.description: Check if gate position could cause issues in stress-critical areas
checks.passCriteria: Gate position does not create weld lines in stress-critical areas

checks.name: Thin-wall/slot detection
checks.nameJa: 極端な薄肉部・長穴形状の検出
checks.description: Detect thin walls or long slots and verify care annotations
checks.passCriteria: No unaddressed thin-wall or long-slot concerns
